label: Liquidity Provision
description: Add or remove liquidity from DeFi pools. Pool selector, fee tier, price range, TVL, and APR display.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary: WidgetErrorBoundary covers all grid widgets globally. requiredEntitlements: [defi-trading]. availableOn: [defi]. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Loading: context does not expose isLoading; FormWidget shows skeleton when isLoading prop is set; marked N/A for context-level loading. Empty state: guard on !pool (fixed: removed '(mock)' text). Error state: FormWidget shows dismissible error banner from useFormSubmit — covers submission errors; context has no error field. No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS: data via useDeFiData() hook. 1.2 PASS: context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 FAIL: liquidityPools is always LIQUIDITY_POOLS regardless of org scope — org filter only gates adjustedTokenBalances/adjustedLendingProtocols/getBridgeRoutes, not liquidityPools. 1.4 FAIL: no client-level cascading filter in context. 1.5 PARTIAL: strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory only, not liquidityPools. 1.6 PASS: empty scope arrays return all data. 1.7 FAIL: LIQUIDITY_POOLS constant lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-liquidity.ts rather than lib/constants/ — reference data in wrong location (context file, not widget file; fix deferred to context migration task).

findings.description: Empty state message contained '(mock)' text — removed and replaced with user-facing message 'No liquidity pools available.'

Context (defi-data-context.tsx) does not expose isLoading or error fields; FormWidget isLoading prop receives no value (undefined = content shown immediately). Context-level loading/error states are N/A for this widget.

liquidityPools is not filtered by org scope — always returns LIQUIDITY_POOLS regardless of globalScope.organizationIds. Context gates other data (tokenBalances, lendingProtocols, bridgeRoutes) via hasDefiDesk but not liquidityPools.
No client-level (clientIds) cascading filter in DeFiDataProvider — 1.4 unimplemented.
LIQUIDITY_POOLS constant is in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-liquidity.ts — should be in lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Requires context file migration (defi-data-context.tsx update, not widget file).
